name: master_admission_rules
description: General Master admission requirements, including academic qualification, academic transcripts, document legalization, English proficiency, faculty evaluation, and study gap rules.

legalization_rules.condition: Document issued in a country not part of the 1961 Hague Convention
Document issued in a country part of the 1961 Hague Convention

document_legalization.uncertainty_instruction: Check the issuing country's Hague Convention status if unsure which legalization rule applies.

english_language_proficiency.required_for: International applicants whose native language is not English
english_language_proficiency.exception: Applicants who completed previous studies fully in English

faculty_evaluation.requirement: Acceptance from the Dean's Office of the chosen faculty
faculty_evaluation.evaluated_by: Director of the selected study programme

study_gap.exception: Longer gap may be accepted if credible certificates of relevant professional work experience are provided.
